task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 12 Change the pressure settings of the Jumbo roll unit

context.p: The pressure settings of the Jumbo roll unit are pre-adjusted correctly at the factory. When for a reason you need to check or correct the pressure settings, perform the procedure below.

prereq.p: In this procedure you make sure that the setup for the High and Low pressure sensors are correct. Do the following:

li.p: No media in the buffer unit
Move the buffer unit manually upwards and downwards until you hear the pressure changing.
Mark or remember these positions (you can measure the distance to the floor).

step.cmd: Set the High and Low pressure to 3.3 bar.
Attach a rope to the roll core. See illustration above.
Spool the rope through the buffer unit.
Attach a weight of 24 Newton (2.4 kg/5.4 lbf) to the rope.
Position the buffer unit in the middle of the 2 marked positions you measured to the floor.
Change the High pressure. Decrease the pressure when the weight is moving down. Increase the pressure when the weight is moving up.

info.p: When the weight is in balance you have defined the correct setting.

step.cmd: Set the Low pressure to 0.6 bar lower then the High pressure.
